title: Sum & Difference Formulas for Sine & Cosine

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Sum & Difference Formulas for Sine & Cosine
summary_sections.content_html:
Sum & Difference Formulas

Sine

  • sin(A + B) = sin A cos B + cos A sin B
  • sin(A − B) = sin A cos B − cos A sin B

Cosine

  • cos(A + B) = cos A cos B − sin A sin B
  • cos(A − B) = cos A cos B + sin A sin B

These formulas let you compute exact values for non-standard angles: e.g., sin 75° = sin(45° + 30°).
